title: OSImage
description: Immutable host image identity and substrate contract for a SourceOS operating-system artifact.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.1.0".

shortId.description: Immutable short substrate identifier. Pattern: so<epoch>-<host-profile>.

family.description: OS family constant for SourceOS image contracts.

epoch.description: Compatibility epoch for the host image contract.

hostProfile.description: Coarse substrate persona for the image. This is not a cybernetic runtime role.

artifact.description: Rendered artifact form for the image.

architecture.description: Target machine architecture for the rendered image.

osRelease.description: Rendered os-release identity fields exported by the image.

ID_LIKE.description: Optional list of upstream-compatible distribution identifiers.

BUILD_ID.description: Optional build identifier for the original installation image.

RELEASE_TYPE.description: Optional release-type hint such as stable or preview.

ociAnnotations.description: OCI metadata carried with the bootable image artifact.

org.opencontainers.image.version.description: OCI version annotation for the built image.

org.opencontainers.image.revision.description: OCI revision annotation referencing the source commit.

org.opencontainers.image.source.description: OCI source annotation referencing the canonical source repository.

com.socioprophet.os.channel.description: SocioProphet-specific update channel label for the image.

substrateCapabilities.description: Host-level capabilities that affect boot, attestation, extension compatibility, or updates.

provenance.description: Attestation and provenance references for the image artifact.

statementRef.description: URN reference to the in-toto or equivalent attestation statement.

slsaPredicateRef.description: URN reference to the SLSA provenance predicate artifact.

sbomRef.description: Optional URN or URL reference to the SBOM for this image.

signatureRef.description: Optional URN or URL reference to the signature verification material.
